title: Upgrading
content:
No, this is not my newest layout. (I know some of you might have noticed the changes.) This is the new MT's default style. Beautiful, isn't it. Maybe I will stick with this one for a while. (?)

Anyway, everything *should* still work. I will try to get things back as soon as possible. But first I will need to finish the database structure for the on-going project. --"

So it will be a bit dusty for a while.

Have a good day.

*[ addition 8/8/05 ]*

In case you haven't noticed, the "photobox":/pbox/ has been reactivated. The reason, and I "quote myself":/pbox/archives/050723-let_the_fun_begins__again.php, is because "photography is one of my most favorite hobby." ;)
